goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 3' and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'address'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be 'in the same area as the hotel'.
Make sure you get 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 3 and should be in the expensive price range
The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the centre
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the same area as the hotel
